$comment: Per-series harvest lists for the Harvest tab. Checkbox state lives in the per-dinner Firestore doc (state.harvest). Reconciled 2026-07-09 against Tim's local-pickup email + Sam's on-site walkthrough: squash blossoms are a SNOW GOOSE local pickup (Tim arranged 50), NOT a farm pick — moved to confirm. Course 1 stone fruit + dessert cherries + agrodolce apricots are all Snow Goose (Tim's pickup). Greens generalized to garden greens (may not be salanova). Actual farm morning-picks: garden greens, Walla Walla, kale, edible flowers, tender herbs.

weekends.label: July 11-12
weekends.intro: Only what needs picking fresh at the farm this weekend. Squash blossoms + all the stone fruit are Snow Goose pickups (Tim) — see the confirm list. Sunday repeats Saturday.

items.name: Mixed garden greens
items.note: Course 1 — over the stracciatella with the stone fruit · whatever lettuce is at its peak (Kelly, beautiful right now) · clean + spin

items.name: Walla Walla onions
items.note: Course 3 contorni · pick + clean, then foil-pack w/ savory, salt, olive oil, pepper, bay leaf and roast

items.name: Edible flowers
items.note: garnish — Course 1, the dessert scatter, the bites

items.name: Tender herbs (garnish + bites)
items.note: thyme (blossom bite), mint (pepper toast, pick fresh), garnish herbs · pasta-lamination herbs came down to SF

confirm.name: Squash blossoms — Snow Goose
confirm.note: 50 arranged from Snow Goose (Tim's local pickup) — NOT a farm pick. Set + fill for the blossom bite.

confirm.name: Stone fruit — Snow Goose
confirm.note: Tim's pickup: apricots (Course 3 agrodolce), peach + nectarine + plum (Course 1), cherries (Course 4 dessert). Tim named apricot/peach/nectarine — CONFIRM cherries are in the pickup.

confirm.name: Beef (at the farm)
confirm.note: 11 lb rib eye + 9 lb roast, slacked + rubbed. Reverse sear: oven then apple-wood egg finish.

weekends.footnote: Coming down to the restaurant, do NOT pick fresh: green garlic (beef rub), tomato leaves (oil), lavender (honey), lemon verbena (cream), the pasta-lamination herbs & flowers, guanciale, and egg yolks. Squash blossoms + all stone fruit are Snow Goose local pickups (Tim), not farm picks.

weekends.label: July 18-19
weekends.intro: Only what needs picking fresh at the farm this weekend. Squash blossoms + stone fruit are Snow Goose pickups (Tim) — confirm the source closer to W2. Sunday repeats Saturday.

items.note: Course 1 — over the stracciatella with the stone fruit · whatever lettuce is at its peak · clean + spin

items.name: Walla Walla onions
items.note: Course 3 contorni · foil-pack w/ savory, salt, olive oil, pepper, bay leaf and roast

items.name: Tender herbs (garnish + bites)
items.note: thyme (blossom bite), mint (pepper toast), garnish herbs · pasta-lamination herbs came down to SF

confirm.name: Squash blossoms — Snow Goose
confirm.note: Snow Goose local pickup like W1 (Kelly may have her own by W2 — confirm the source). Set + fill for the blossom bite.

confirm.name: Stone fruit — Snow Goose
confirm.note: Tim's pickup: apricots (agrodolce), peach/nectarine/plum (Course 1), cherries (dessert). Confirm cherries + ripeness for W2.

confirm.name: Beef (at the farm)
confirm.note: Confirm the cut held for the second weekend. Reverse sear: oven then apple-wood egg finish.

weekends.footnote: Coming down to the restaurant, do NOT pick fresh: green garlic (beef rub), tomato leaves (oil), lavender (honey), lemon verbena (cream), pasta-lamination herbs & flowers, guanciale, egg yolks. Squash blossoms + all stone fruit are Snow Goose local pickups (Tim), not farm picks.
